title: There Is, There Are
description: How English says 'tem' / 'há'. THERE IS for singular, THERE ARE for plural.
summary_pt_br: Como o inglês diz 'TEM' (no sentido de existir): THERE IS (singular), THERE ARE (plural). NUNCA 'there has' ou 'have' — armadilha clássica brasileira.

scenes.text_en:
Maya counted. 'THERE IS a dog on the sofa.
THERE ARE two cats in the kitchen.
THERE IS coffee in the pot.
THERE ARE many books in this room.'
scenes.text_pt:
Maya contou. 'TEM um cachorro no sofá (singular).
TEM dois gatos na cozinha (plural).
TEM café no bule (incontável, singular).
TEM muitos livros neste quarto (plural).'

scenes.title: Rule + the big trap
scenes.body_en: THERE IS + singular / uncountable. THERE ARE + plural. Short: There's (is) / There're is rare. Negative: There isn't / There aren't. Question: Is there…? Are there…? TRAP: Brazilians often say 'Have' ('Have a dog here'). WRONG. Always 'There is/are'.
scenes.body_pt: THERE IS + singular ou incontável. THERE ARE + plural. Pegadinha: brasileiros dizem 'Have a dog' — ERRADO. Sempre 'There is/are'.

examples.en: There IS milk in the fridge.

exercise.question: Complete: '___ ___ three chairs in the room.' (tem três)
Which is correct?
exercise.explanation: English uses THERE IS for existence. Never 'have' in this sense.

exercise.question: Complete: 'Is ___ a bathroom here?' (pergunta)
exercise.explanation: Question: IS THERE…? Invert 'there is' to 'is there'.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "There Is, There Are". How English says 'tem' / 'há'. THERE IS for singular, THERE ARE for plural. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "There Is, There Are". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'There Is, There Are'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "There Is, There Are".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
